case_title: MONDRAGON LUIS EDUARDO VS LUNA ANGEL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONDRAGON LUIS EDUARDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUNA ANGEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
